how_it_works.title: Write About Your Business
how_it_works.description: Tell us in a few sentences what you do. For example: 'English courses for children in Moscow.'

how_it_works.title: AI Creates Your Website
how_it_works.description: The neural network generates the structure, texts, colors, and images for your website.

how_it_works.title: Edit
how_it_works.description: Add your own photo, change texts or block order — all in the visual editor.

how_it_works.title: Publish
how_it_works.description: Click the button — and your website is live. Share the link with your customers.

faq.question: How to create a website for free without skills?
faq.answer: Simply sign up at Promto and describe your business. AI will automatically create the website — no programming, design, or technical knowledge needed.

faq.question: Is there a free plan with real capabilities?
faq.answer: Yes. The basic plan lets you create up to 3 websites, edit them, and publish for free. That's enough to get started.

faq.question: How many websites can I create for free?
faq.answer: Up to 3 websites on the free plan. If you need more — upgrade to a paid plan.

faq.question: Will there be a watermark on my website?
faq.answer: On the free plan, there's a small Promto logo in the website footer. On paid plans, the watermark is removed.

faq.question: Can I use my own domain for free?
faq.answer: Connecting a custom domain is available on paid plans. The free plan uses a Promto subdomain.

faq.question: How quickly will the ready website appear?
faq.answer: Generation takes about 2 minutes. That's many times faster than using a manual builder or ordering from a developer.

cta_mid_title: Create a Website for Free Right Now
cta_mid_subtitle: No obligations, no payments. Just describe your business — and the website is ready.
cta_final_subtitle: Your first website — in 2 minutes and at no cost. Try it right now.
